functions.name: keyrx_runtime_add_slot
functions.description: Add a new runtime slot for a device (or update existing).

parameters.name: device_json
parameters.description: JSON representation of the device instance

parameters.name: slot_json
parameters.description: JSON representation of the profile slot to add/update

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Priority of the slot (depreciated/ignored in favor of slot_json.priority)

functions.name: keyrx_runtime_remove_slot
functions.description: Remove a runtime slot for a device.

parameters.name: device_json
parameters.description: JSON representation of the device instance

parameters.name: slot_id
parameters.description: ID of the slot to remove

parameters.name: device_json
parameters.description: JSON representation of the device instance

parameters.name: slot_id
parameters.description: ID of the slot to reorder

functions.name: keyrx_runtime_set_slot_active
functions.description: Toggle a runtime slot active flag.

parameters.name: device_json
parameters.description: JSON representation of the device instance

parameters.name: slot_id
parameters.description: ID of the slot to toggle
